subject: [PATCH v7 2/2] selftests/firmware: add search path test for firmware_class.search_path=

2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch adds a new selftest, fw_search.sh, to validate the firmware_class.search_path= module parameter. The test covers various scenarios, including firmware found in different search directories, priority of path= over search_path=, and handling of escaped characters in directory names. The test also checks that an empty search_path= does not break firmware loading and that sysfs readback matches what was written.
